tagline: Genie Chat prompt monitoring (Beta): Prompts and responses initiated by Genie Chat are now visible in Genie Spaces monitoring when the sharing Beta is enabled.
what_it_does: Genie Chat prompt monitoring (Beta): Prompts and responses initiated by Genie Chat are now visible in Genie Spaces monitoring when the sharing Beta is enabled. Knowledge store edit confirmation dialog: A confirmation dialog now appears before an author removes a table that has knowledge store edits (for example, local table or column descriptions or hidden columns). Delete conversations: Users with CAN MANAGE permission can now delete the conversations of other users from the UI, matching existing API capabilities.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
key_takeaway: Genie Chat prompt monitoring (Beta): Prompts and responses initiated by Genie Chat are now visible in Genie Spaces monitoring when the sharing Beta is enabled.
